items.alt: Kazomo spin mop — 360° turntable packaging video
items.caption: Turntable reel: gloss highlights, soft shadow tray, and label read at a glance—ideal for Amazon PDP or pitch decks.
Structural hero still: warm board tones and rim light that read on both retina displays and printed one-pagers.

items.alt: 3D Box Studio interface with viewport and controls
items.caption: Live studio layout—dimensions, materials, and the WebGL viewport together so art directors can iterate without leaving the browser.
Per-face artwork controls: quick rotate and clear so dieline exports map cleanly onto the 3D preview.
